business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors.

coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12; policy number cpGLFS20258823; deductible shown as 50000; coinsurance shown as 80.00.
Included in Commercial Property schedule of limits.
Coverage form CP 15 06 (10 12) attached; applies to actual loss of business income during the period of restoration and continuing normal operating expenses, including payroll.
Endorsement CP 99 30 (07 88) attached; coinsurance additional condition is suspended for property specified in the schedule during the declarations period.
Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12) attached; applies to direct physical loss or damage caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services to the described premises.

document_info.document_type: Commercial Property Policy Declarations and Building and Personal Property Coverage Form
